_comment: Copy this file to 'payment.config.json' (same folder). It is gitignored. Restart the server after editing.
_upi_comment: upiVpa is the REAL UPI ID money is paid INTO (your merchant/personal VPA, e.g. yourbiz@okhdfcbank or 9876543210@ybl). PhonePe/GPay REJECT payments to a non-existent VPA, so the placeholder 'homehelp@upi' will NOT work — set a real one. For testing you can use your own UPI ID to pay yourself.
_razorpay_comment: Optional — paste Razorpay keys to enable Cards/NetBanking/Wallets via Razorpay Checkout. Test keys: https://dashboard.razorpay.com/app/keys
